description: A hematology ward pharmacist needs to check whether ciprofloxacin (a fluoroquinolone antibiotic) can be safely co-administered with venetoclax (a BCL-2 inhibitor for CLL) using the Liverpool Cancer iChart app. Determine the traffic light interaction color for this drug pair and save the result as a single lowercase word (e.g., 'red', 'orange', 'yellow', 'green', or 'grey') to /sdcard/tasks/check_antibiotic_interaction_with_venetoclax/result.txt.
